parsed.production_notes: The character's facial movements are slightly unnatural and repetitive. The lip-sync is not perfectly aligned with the audio, and the eyes have a glassy, static quality typical of AI avatars. The voice is also clearly synthesized.

characters.appearance: Young woman with a slim build and fair, freckled complexion. She has straight, shoulder-length bright red hair parted in the middle. Her eyes are green.
characters.wardrobe: A dark brown, ribbed, square-neck short-sleeved top. She wears a necklace made of white pearls and dark, elongated beads.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, direct, and engaging, though slightly robotic in movement.

scenes.setting: A plain, seamless white background. Bright, even studio lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of Character A positioned in the center of the frame against a stark white background. She is looking directly into the camera lens. Her expression is earnest and communicative. The lighting is bright and flat, eliminating any harsh shadows on her face or the background. She makes subtle head movements as she speaks.

scenes.visual_description: A continuous close-up shot of the AI avatar speaking directly to the viewer. The background remains a solid white throughout. Dynamic, word-by-word captions appear in the lower center of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Every day you don't practice speaking English is a day you stay exactly where you are.
Character A says: I'm Loora, your AI English tutor, and I'm here to make sure that doesn't happen.

scenes.setting: A plain, seamless white background. Bright, even studio lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of Character A centered against a plain white background. She maintains direct eye contact with the camera. Her facial expressions shift slightly to emphasize her points, with occasional blinks and small nods. The framing and lighting remain consistent, focusing entirely on her face and upper shoulders.

scenes.visual_description: The same continuous close-up shot of the AI avatar. She continues to speak directly to the camera. Word-by-word captions continue to flash on the screen in the lower third.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: With me, you get real conversations anytime, anywhere.
Character A says: No scheduling, no awkwardness.
Character A says: Just you and me, talking.

scenes.setting: A plain, seamless white background. Bright, even studio lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is framed in a close-up against a solid white backdrop. She looks straight ahead, engaging the viewer. Her head tilts slightly as she explains the features. The bright, even lighting highlights her red hair and freckles. The composition remains static, keeping the focus entirely on her.

scenes.visual_description: The continuous close-up shot persists. The avatar speaks with slight head movements. The dynamic captions keep appearing in the lower center, matching her speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I give you instant feedback on your mistakes.
Character A says: Not after the conversation, during it.
Character A says: So your brain connects the correction to the moment, and you actually remember it next time.

scenes.setting: A plain, seamless white background. Bright, even studio lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up of Character A against a stark white background. She looks directly into the lens with a welcoming expression. Her posture is upright, and she makes small, rhythmic head movements. The lighting is flat and bright, and the framing is tight on her face and neckline.

scenes.visual_description: The final segment of the continuous close-up shot. The avatar delivers the call to action. The video ends with her looking at the camera. Captions continue to display her spoken words.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Five minutes a day is enough to start feeling the difference.
Character A says: 10 minutes and you'll wonder why you waited this long.
Character A says: Let's practice together, right now.
